name: jukebox
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends pkg-config libasound2-dev libpcsclite-dev && RUST_VERSION=$(sed -nE 's/^rust-version = "([^"]+)"/\1/p' Cargo.toml) && rustup toolchain install "$RUST_VERSION" && rustup default "$RUST_VERSION" && rustup component add rustfmt clippy && cargo build && cargo test --no-run && cargo build --release --bins --all-features
